title: Create Documentation and User Guide
description: Write comprehensive documentation: README with project overview and setup, user guide with screenshots, developer guide for contributing, API documentation for IPC commands, architecture decision records (ADRs) for key choices. Include troubleshooting section.
acceptance_criteria: README.md with project description, screenshots, quick start
docs/user-guide.md covers all features with annotated screenshots
docs/api.md documents all Tauri IPC commands with examples
docs/adr/ contains decision records for: Tauri choice, DB schema, IPC protocol
docs/troubleshooting.md lists common issues and solutions
Documentation builds with mdBook or similar for web viewing
agent_output: Comprehensive README with features, keyboard shortcuts, installation, architecture, tech stack, design system, and CTO Orchestrator integration docs.
